    • getProof

      public Proof getProof()

    • getFirstOpenGoal

      public @NonNull Goal getFirstOpenGoal(boolean checkAutomatic) throws ScriptException
      Returns the first open goal, which has to be automatic iff checkAutomatic is true.
      Parameters:
      checkAutomatic - Set to true if the returned Goal should be automatic.
      Returns:
      the first open goal, which has to be automatic iff checkAutomatic is true.
      Throws:
      ProofAlreadyClosedException - If the proof is already closed when calling this method.
      ScriptException - If there is no such Goal, or something else goes wrong.

    • getFirstOpenAutomaticGoal

      public Goal getFirstOpenAutomaticGoal() throws ScriptException
      Returns:
      The first open and automatic Goal.
      Throws:
      ScriptException - If there is no such Goal.

      public JTerm toTerm(String string, @Nullable Sort sort) throws ParserException, ScriptException
      Throws:
      ParserException
      ScriptException

      Throws:
      ScriptException

      ScriptException
